Sep 22, 2022  —  Below are a few ways to greet somebody in the  morning . As a rule of thumb, you may use “Bonjour” until about 6pm. Then, “Bonsoir” takes over. Read more
results.title: How to Say Good Morning in French in 33 Classic Ways

results.text: If you want to be correct usebonjour.
results.title: How to Say "Good Morning" in French

results.text: Just to be a bit pedantic, the spelling is "Bonġu". In France, it's "bonjour" or "salut" (colloquial). Read more
results.title: How to say good morning controversy : r/French

results.text: Bon matin means Good morning . Bon jour means Good Day|'Jour' definition is 'day' and 'matin' is morning.
results.title: Jow to say good morning in french

results.text: May 3, 2023  —  In French, the appropriate reply to "good morning" is simply "Bonjour", and you may also add "Comment allez-vous?" (How are you?). Read more

results.text: The simple, standard way of saying so is, 'bonjour'. This is the standard way to say " good morning " in  French , and you can use this greeting ... Read more
